---
title: 'Memories'
date: '2010-05-09T16:02:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '5109156679615714780'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8614949036188608376'
blogger_filename: '/2010/05/memories.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/5109156679615714780/feed.atom'
---

Memories:<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/672bbe130e33-1208831687000-4a7b3ea782e1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="163" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/672bbe130e33-1208831687000-e67cee23b87d.jpg" width="200" /></a></div><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Connor REALLY &nbsp;ENJOYED Disney Land!<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/b665815f6568-1234737599000-1389994eb69b.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/b665815f6568-1234737599000-8cc20f2a06fb.jpeg" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;">I like Daddy's Hat!!</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/def76e808c8e-1241721611000-90f5ec46c66f.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="266" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/def76e808c8e-1241721611000-be3e87cf3cf3.jpeg" width="400" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><br />
<br />
<br />
Preston's&nbsp;first trip to the beach HE HAD FUN!<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-679b3735c847.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-9082135a6449.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br />
<div style="text-align: center;">Chuck E Cheese, E-roller coasters are cool!</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image000-9097fbb60067.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image000-28486a60745a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: right;">Gideup!</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/f12af1828ee4-1230798328000-441a26eee088.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="266" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/f12af1828ee4-1230798328000-7386378e5717.jpeg" width="400" /></a></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: center;">New Years Morning 2009</div><div style="text-align: center;">Walking to the bus in the fog on my way home from Ruth's Chris</div><div style="text-align: center;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div><div style="text-align: right;"><br />
</div>
